calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-18-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. (212)

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Aug-04-2008 Continued To Nov-18-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2008 Continued To Aug-05-08 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Hearing On Petition For Compromise Of A Claim Of An Adult With A Disability.
Off Calendar May-20-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for hearing on Petition to Approve a Compromise of a Disputed Claim of an Adult with a Disability.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Robert G. Burton, Esq. appeared with Ann M. Morales, who was present as Conservator for claimant Jill Morales, who was also present at today's hearing.
Petitioner was place under oath and testified.

On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.

Total Settlement - $20,000.00.
Attorney's Fees - $6,458.83.
Medical Expenses - $5,552.00.
Costs - $1,530.33.

A net balance of $6,458.84 shall be deposited into a blocked account with Washington Mutual Bank, located at 5655 Geary Boulevard, San Francisco, CA, and entitled Shelby M. Morales for Jill J. Morales.

Orders Approving Compromise of Claim, and to Deposit Money Into a Blocked Account, were submitted to and signed by the Court.

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
